75440.subject: Happy birthday America, the ally Europe admires—uneasily
75440.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sJmNvrifr3nCgfbbaJ-Emclh_a6sUlVdh4S-5v26ffheyBRPyUZfSd88Tx0zrO8KW_Sy8XrYeOyvXA3af5dNlQdSb9CtT8mswwgCjDqg 

July 3rd 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sKwMCYU-3A1lOA5Y_5fQ-u3HMeNyvNd2ND7gM1Uv_S9gr9874BEC4SfIQPffIaY3T-otIa6XAPMAaOK37vuQJFT86tTpKw4EIUJGWhvg 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sLIFERoHg1Vrm57W8GC-iTuioW7Xil7f1w5JhtzUyfSvuMOL9dCnVPOekJl42FVKkdr5I1IzxKUACaBPefqW3sXzIr7dltJXJklN-UXQ 


 


 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



America is undeniably richer and more powerful than Europe. Some Europeans sneer that comes with costs (in quality of life, inequality or environmental damage) which they simply wouldn’t put up with. Maybe. But as the new kid turns 250, the two sides can learn from each other without having to 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sM5kSGJZAudysJiwMBnSfYn1Yd1x910Pg-lgKeJ6GUtzs5U630W8h7i1eR501aUylTL-UJTrvfD5nnHBvyX4p0Q_xeiq8u4r5b 
import each other’s flaws .


We said oil prices were in “la-la land” and had to go much higher as a result of the Iran war. 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sNSmc69kHIS1kT16B0zeQnnmF_a4M08JAw-h2lEaltMkx7rL77pR

75439.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 3
75439.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-3-oleh-bezuhlyi-qky4f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B%2BO04vUwhSb2bdqBd3O49BQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1q2oZwW3PLtIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr54wwc4~4f-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr54wwc4-4f
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Beyond Bitcoin's rebound, the day's real signal is structural: institutions and regulators are rewiring crypto's plumbing — tokenized equities, real-world assets and fresh rulebooks — while enforcement actions and DeFi expansion push the sector steadily forward. 🏦 Robinhood CEO Bets Crypto's Future Is Real-World Assets, Not Memecoins Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev argued that the merging of traditional finance and crypto — not memecoins — defines the sector's future, pushing back on the idea that digital assets have entered an enduring downturn. The comments land as Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet and the brokerage leans harder into tokenized stocks and on-chain lending. Read full story 🇪🇺 Europe Opens 'MiCA 2.0' Review of Its Crypto Rulebook Three years after MiCA became law, the EU has opened a formal review — informally called "MiCA 2.0" — through a consultation set to close around September. The rethink could reshape how exchanges, stablecoin issuers and custodians operate across the bloc as regulators weigh what the landmark framework got right and where it fell short. More details 🇮🇳 Maharashtra Brings Crypto Under Depositor Protection Law India's Maharashtra state moved to place cryptocurrencies and virtual digital assets under its depositor protection law, and will set up district-level financial monitoring units to flag fraudulent investment schemes. The amendment marks a tightening of state-level oversight of crypto fraud in one of India's largest economies. Read more 🕸️ Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to US Over $8M Crypto Ransom A suspect linked to the Scattered Spider hacking group was extradited to the United States to face charges tied to an $8 million crypto ransom demand. The case highlights the deepening cross-border cooperation aimed at dismantling cybercrime networks that rely on crypto for extortion. See details 🧱 Securitize Launches Tokenized SECZ Stock on Avalanche and Solana Securitize debuted tokenized shares of its own SECZ stock on Avalanche and Solana, timed to its common stock's debut on the New York Stock Exchange. Running a public equity and its on-chain token side by side is one of the clearest attempts yet to fuse listed shares with blockchain settlement. Read full story 💧 Aave Deploys V3 Lending and GHO Stablecoin on Monad Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on

75436.subject: Building with RWAs
75436.body:
View this post on the web at https://uniswap.substack.com/p/building-with-rwas

this week: rwa summer continues ∞ robinhood stocks onchain ∞ auctions in one click ∞ spark’s fx layer, powered by v4 ∞ something mega is here ∞ why slow trading matters
Community news
Build with RWAs on Robinhood Chain: Robinhood Chain is live [ https://substack.com/redirect/5eba41d6-009e-41d4-bdec-6151f9889706?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Uniswap is the primary public AMM from day one. This week Uniswap Protocol and UniswapX went live alongside our apps, Wallet, and API. For builders, just one integration puts Robinhood Stock Tokens in the same workflow as any crypto-native token. Get started here. [ https://substack.com/redirect/daa07d86-0eb0-469d-84fa-f677510b04da?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]
Speaking of real-world assets: Which I always am, only one of us is focused on fake world assets [ https://substack.com/redirect/3451b49f-eb86-4f48-aedc-ea0c95bd77c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Ondo’s tokenized stocks are now live on Uniswap apps [ https://substack.com/redirect/9e38b392-1e10-48f5-96ff-0adceaa1089f?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]: 430+ tokenized stocks and ETFs covering the most-traded US equities, across Ethereum and BNB Chain.
Bootstrap liquidity in a few clicks: Teams can now launch token auctions straight from the Uniswap Web App. [ https://substack.com/redirect/1fc8b195-b44f-4c04-9a02-951e3882e823?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] Onchain price discovery, transparent distribution, and instant liquidity, no code required. It’s powered by Continuous Clearing Auctions (CCAs), and it’s live now on Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, and Unichain, with more chains coming. Everything you need to bootstrap liquidity, in one place.
Shared stablecoin liquidity on v4: Spark just deployed ~$150M to Uniswap v4 [ https://substack.com/redirect/5a85ad08-0fd1-4206-a9a8-9fae6b1b4cfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] to launch its Stablecoin FX Layer: shared infrastructure that lets stablecoins tap common depth instead of spinning up isolated pools. Across the first USDS/PYUSD and USDS/USDT pools, that liquidity did over $70M in volume in its first three days.
Next it moves to DualPool [ https://substack.com/redirect/97906b43-9d90-4ff7-a6a8-21f0e03f6a11?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], a custom hook (coming soon) built to keep capital available the moment execution needs it, instead of sitting idle between swaps. Another builder composing a new market structure on top of the protocol with hooks, you love to see it.
Something mega is happening: MegaETH is now live [ https://substack.com/redirect/feb3e66b-b5b0-447c-a560-1135e07d6f2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on the Uniswap Web

75435.subject: Crypto Biz: Bitcoin maximalism meets capital markets
75435.body:
Crypto Biz Newsletter

Автор: Cointelegraph


Автор: Cointelegraph

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/crypto-biz-bitcoin-maximalism-meets-capital-markets-cointelegraph-bwdbc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BnO6KZtk6RfWY8Yw99PLr1w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=00xb4zQS77tIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr53hqhx~dr-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr53hqhx-dr
  
For years, Michael Saylor’s Strategy built its brand around a simple mantra: Buy Bitcoin. Never sell. This week, that narrative changed.   The company authorized up to $1.25 billion in Bitcoin sales under a new capital framework. At current prices, that equates to roughly 21,000 BTC that could eventually hit the market — a reminder that even Bitcoin’s most committed corporate holder isn’t immune to the realities of capital management. This week’s Crypto Biz explores how the digital asset industry is entering a more pragmatic phase, where ideological purity is giving way to financial discipline. It also examines the intensifying stablecoin race as issuers compete for reserve yield, Fidelity's latest defense of Bitcoin's long-term security model and the crypto industry’s growing political influence ahead of the 2026 US midterm elections. Strategy authorizes $1.25 billion in Bitcoin sales to fund dividends, buybacks Strategy has authorized up to $1.25 billion in Bitcoin sales under a new capital framework that will fund shareholder dividends, bolster cash reserves and repurchase stock while preserving its long-term Bitcoin strategy. The company’s new “Digital Credit Capital Framework” raises the annual dividend on its STRC preferred stock from 11.5% to 12%, establishes a formal Bitcoin monetization program and expands capital return initiatives through buybacks of preferred securities and MSTR shares. Strategy also said its dedicated cash reserve has grown to $2.55 billion, enough to cover roughly 17 months of preferred dividends and interest payments. The framework reflects an evolution in Strategy’s capital allocation. After years of insisting it would never sell Bitcoin, the company has now established a formal monetization program and disclosed selling 32 BTC in June. Strategy made no Bitcoin purchases last week, leaving its holdings unchanged at 847,363 BTC as it places greater emphasis on liquidity management alongside its Bitcoin accumulation strategy. Source: Michael Saylor Continue Reading… Payments giants back new stablecoin to challenge USDT, USDC More than 140 financial and crypto companies have joined forces to launch a new US dollar-backed stablecoin that lets participants retain the yield generated by its reserves, marking one of the industry’s biggest coordinated stablecoin initiatives to date. The Open USD (

75382.subject: Important updates to your MetaMask CL Card agreements
75382.body:
Important Update Regarding Your Card 
Dear Oleh

We’re reaching out to let you know about a small, behind-the-scenes update to 
the providers that support your MetaMask CL Card. First, the good news: there’s 
nothing you need to do. Your card and the way you use your account all stay 
exactly the same. We just believe you should always know who’s looking after 
your account. Here’s what’s changing, and why:

From 1 July 2026, the crypto-asset services in your account will be powered by 
MoonPay Europe B.V., a crypto-asset service provider authorized under the EU 
Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) by the Netherlands Authority for the 
Financial Markets (AFM). Your card and payments providers continue unchanged.

This change does not alter the terms of your agreement with us. The updated 
terms that apply to the crypto-asset services are MoonPay’sTerms of Use 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/terms_of_use_europe> and Privacy Policy 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/privacy_policy>.

We’re proud to keep powering your MetaMask CL Card.

Questions about this update, or anything else on your account? We’re always 
happy to help at metamask@cl-cards.com <mailto:support@cl-cards.com>.

Need a new card? You can order one in the app in a couple of taps, and don’t 
forget you can delegate and spend straight from your wallet.

Crypto-asset services are provided by MoonPay Europe B.V., authorized by the 
Netherlands Authority for the Financial Markets
(AFM) under Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA). Card and payment services are 
provided by Monavate Ltd, The Officers Mess Business Centre, Royston Road, 
Duxford,Cambridge, England, CB22 4QH
Unsubscribe 
<https://links.cl-cards.com/s/u/SiQ5AD4WG0u6jZlbDv-szh-il9QkEQ71njmDn-dBiCUfN6hxuhb3aQxuoEfI_4dCx_SaHmZg7ZrymRTUDsQfQzJYmGJsICucyuDvBin9LDGcybkapoMmbeTeXCMf11u3MeAA1EK7aQ6BoHaZQv3BRz5n8kQlSQt9aZ6ndM0DQE9t0VKBIW7P_5ZpMv6n/uQhGfkvsprPzLWOPljn1rZz5zHOjmEC5/22>
